message.content:
Implement the following plan: # Fix: Color popover clipped on mobile ## Context On mobile (≤640px), the `.color-popover` is invisible because it's trapped inside `.editor-mode-shell` which has `overflow: hidden`. The toolbar (containing the color picker) is rendered by `EditorInner` inside `.editor-mode-shell`, so the popover can never escape. ## Root Cause DOM hierarchy: ``` .editor-mode-shell (overflow: hidden) ← Editor.jsx line 178 .toolbar-wrapper ← RichTextEditor.jsx line 260 .toolbar (overflow-x: auto on mobile) .toolbar-color-picker .color-popover ← clipped by both ancestors ``` ## Fix: Move toolbar outside `.editor-mode-shell` Move the `` + wrapper rendering from `RichTextEditor.jsx` up into `Editor.jsx`, placing it **before** `.editor-mode-shell`. This removes the popover from the overflow clipping context entirely. ### File 1: `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/Editor.jsx` 1. Add `import ToolBar from './Toolbar'` 2. Move `
` to render **before** `
` (around line 178) 3. Pass `addUploadedImagePath={addUploadedImagePath}` (already available as `addUploadedImagePath` state + `addUploadedImagePath` callback — note: the prop name used by ToolBar is `addUploadedImagePath`) ### File 2: `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/RichTextEditor.jsx` 1. Remove the `
` block (lines 259-262) 2. Remove the `ToolBar` import (line 22) since it's no longer used here ### File 3: `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/editor.css` 1. Revert the z-index mobile override added earlier (restore original state) 2. Also add the upward-flip override for `.color-popover` in the mobile media query — the popover still drops downward into `.toolbar`'s `overflow-x: auto` on mobile: ```css .color-popover { bottom: calc(100% + 6px); top: auto; } ``` New DOM hierarchy: ``` .editor-container .toolbar-wrapper ← now outside shell, no overflow clipping .toolbar .color-popover ← free to render above .editor-mode-shell (overflow: hidden) .editor-shell (editor content) ``` ## Verification 1. Open editor in devtools at 375px width 2. Scroll toolbar to color buttons, tap text color — popover appears above toolbar, fully visible 3. Tap highlight — same 4. Swatches clickable, apply color to text 5. Desktop (>640px) — popover drops downward as before, unchanged 6. All toolbar buttons still functional (they use Lexical context, which wraps `Editor.jsx`) If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\johnm\.claude\projects\C--Users-johnm-iskrib-v3\97ffd241-5d82-4fc4-b624-110c52cd0b58.jsonl

planContent:
# Fix: Color popover clipped on mobile ## Context On mobile (≤640px), the `.color-popover` is invisible because it's trapped inside `.editor-mode-shell` which has `overflow: hidden`. The toolbar (containing the color picker) is rendered by `EditorInner` inside `.editor-mode-shell`, so the popover can never escape. ## Root Cause DOM hierarchy: ``` .editor-mode-shell (overflow: hidden) ← Editor.jsx line 178 .toolbar-wrapper ← RichTextEditor.jsx line 260 .toolbar (overflow-x: auto on mobile) .toolbar-color-picker .color-popover ← clipped by both ancestors ``` ## Fix: Move toolbar outside `.editor-mode-shell` Move the `` + wrapper rendering from `RichTextEditor.jsx` up into `Editor.jsx`, placing it **before** `.editor-mode-shell`. This removes the popover from the overflow clipping context entirely. ### File 1: `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/Editor.jsx` 1. Add `import ToolBar from './Toolbar'` 2. Move `
` to render **before** `
` (around line 178) 3. Pass `addUploadedImagePath={addUploadedImagePath}` (already available as `addUploadedImagePath` state + `addUploadedImagePath` callback — note: the prop name used by ToolBar is `addUploadedImagePath`) ### File 2: `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/RichTextEditor.jsx` 1. Remove the `
` block (lines 259-262) 2. Remove the `ToolBar` import (line 22) since it's no longer used here ### File 3: `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/editor.css` 1. Revert the z-index mobile override added earlier (restore original state) 2. Also add the upward-flip override for `.color-popover` in the mobile media query — the popover still drops downward into `.toolbar`'s `overflow-x: auto` on mobile: ```css .color-popover { bottom: calc(100% + 6px); top: auto; } ``` New DOM hierarchy: ``` .editor-container .toolbar-wrapper ← now outside shell, no overflow clipping .toolbar .color-popover ← free to render above .editor-mode-shell (overflow: hidden) .editor-shell (editor content) ``` ## Verification 1. Open editor in devtools at 375px width 2. Scroll toolbar to color buttons, tap text color — popover appears above toolbar, fully visible 3. Tap highlight — same 4. Swatches clickable, apply color to text 5. Desktop (>640px) — popover drops downward as before, unchanged 6. All toolbar buttons still functional (they use Lexical context, which wraps `Editor.jsx`)

content.text:
Done. Here's what changed: 1. **Editor.jsx** — Imported `ToolBar` and rendered `
` **before** `.editor-mode-shell`, so the popover escapes the `overflow: hidden` container. 2. **RichTextEditor.jsx** — Removed the `ToolBar` import and the toolbar-wrapper block (toolbar is now rendered by the parent). 3. **editor.css** — Replaced the `z-index: 200` mobile override with `bottom: calc(100% + 6px); top: auto;` so the color popover opens **upward** on mobile, avoiding the toolbar's `overflow-x: auto` clipping.
